title: phyllanthus phialanthoides
intro: Phyllanthus phialanthoides, also known as Green Globe, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Phyllanthaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus phialanthoides include reducing liver damage, improving immune function, and treating various health conditions such as fever and digestive issues. Phyllanthus phialanthoides can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, or as a tincture or capsule supplement.
